summary:
The collagen matrix in human articular cartilage becomes disorganized and degraded due to upregulation of matrix metalloproteinases in osteoarthritis. This leads to impaired mechanical function and reduced cartilage resilience, reflecting progressive disease pathology.  

\boxed{A}

This leads to impaired mechanical function and reduced cartilage resilience, reflecting progressive disease pathology.  

\boxed{A}. Answer choice: A
